sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n48260" key="qeo/pneustos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">θεό-πνευ-στος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n48260.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">inspired of God</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">σοφίη</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1605.tlg001:129" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Ps.-Phoc.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">129</biblScope> </bibl> </cit>; <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ὄνειροι</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.904f</biblScope> </bibl> </cit>; <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">πᾶσα γραφή</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0031.tlg016.perseus-grc1:3:16" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">2 Ep.Ti.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.16</biblScope> </bibl> </cit>; <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">δημιούργημα</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1764.tlg001:330:19" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Vett.Val.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">330.19</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
